classes.docstring: Base exception for transport errors.

classes.docstring: Error establishing or maintaining connection.

classes.name: TimeoutError
classes.docstring: Operation timed out.

classes.name: BaseTransport
classes.docstring:
Abstract base class for MCP transports.

    All transport implementations must inherit from this class
    and implement the abstract methods.

classes.name: StdioTransport
classes.docstring:

classes.name: InMemoryTransport
classes.docstring:
In-memory transport for testing.

    Routes requests directly to a protocol handler without subprocess.
    Useful for unit testing and local development.

classes.name: PermissionManager
